# Vosthermos — Door and Window Repair Experts in Quebec

> Vosthermos is a Quebec-based company specializing in residential door and window repair. We offer sealed glass (thermos) replacement, hardware replacement, wooden door repair, custom screen doors, caulking, defogging, and weatherstripping. We also operate the only online parts store in Quebec with 740+ replacement parts. Serving Montreal, South Shore, and surrounding areas within 100km.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.vosthermos.com): Main landing page with services overview
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/remplacement-vitre-thermos): Sealed glass replacement service
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/remplacement-quincaillerie): Hardware replacement service
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/reparation-portes-bois): Wooden door repair
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/moustiquaires-sur-mesure): Custom screen doors
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/calfeutrage): Caulking
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/desembuage): Defogging
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/insertion-porte): Door inserts
- [Services](https://www.vosthermos.com/services/coupe-froid): Weatherstripping
- [Pricing](https://www.vosthermos.com/prix): Complete pricing guide 2026
- [Online Store](https://www.vosthermos.com/boutique): 740+ replacement parts
- [Diagnostic Tool](https://www.vosthermos.com/diagnostic): Free window diagnostic
- [Energy Calculator](https://www.vosthermos.com/calculateur-economies): Energy savings calculator
- [Glossary](https://www.vosthermos.com/glossaire): 46 technical terms defined
- [Warranty](https://www.vosthermos.com/garantie): 10-year transferable warranty details
- [FAQ](https://www.vosthermos.com/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Blog](https://www.vosthermos.com/blogue): Expert articles and guides

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2010
- Experience: 15+ years
- Location: 330 Ch. St-Francois-Xavier, Local 101, Saint-Francois-Xavier, QC
- Phone: 514-825-8411
- Email: info@vosthermos.com
- Service area: Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, Brossard, Boucherville, Saint-Hyacinthe, Granby, Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu, Chambly, Terrebonne, Repentigny, Blainville, Chateauguay, La Prairie, Sainte-Julie, Varennes, Delson, Candiac, Saint-Bruno, Mascouche
- Warranty: 10 years on thermos replacement (transferable to next owner), 5 years on labor
- Online store: 740+ parts compatible with Novatech, Lepage, Fenplast, Jeld-Wen, Kohltech
- Languages: French, English

## Pricing (2026)

- Sealed glass (thermos) replacement: starting at $150/unit installed
- Hardware replacement: starting at $4.99/piece
- Caulking: starting at $8/linear foot
- Defogging: starting at $120/unit
- Wooden door repair: free estimate
- Custom screen doors: free estimate
